title: Social Security claims at 62 get social media buzz — experts say proceed with caution
summary: A trend of claiming Social Security benefits at age 62 is gaining social media attention, but financial experts recommend caution about the long-term impact on retirement income. Claiming earlier typically reduces lifetime benefits.
content: This measure for claiming Social Security retirement benefits may encourage people to start benefits at 62. But experts say to proceed with caution.

zh.title: 62岁领取社会保障金引发社交媒体热议——专家建议谨慎行动
zh.summary: 在62岁时领取社会保障福利的趋势在社交媒体上获得关注，但财务专家建议谨慎考虑其对退休收入的长期影响。提前领取通常会减少终身福利。

title: High gas prices are hurting restaurant sales — but not all chains
summary: Restaurant traffic fell 2.3% in March compared to the prior year as high gas prices reduce consumer spending. The impact varies across different restaurant chains.
content: Restaurant traffic fell 2.3% in March compared with the year-ago period, according to Black Box Intelligence.

zh.title: 高油价伤害餐厅销售——但不是所有连锁企业都受影响
zh.summary: 由于高油价减少消费者支出，三月餐厅流量同比下降2.3%。不同餐厅连锁企业的影响程度各不相同。

title: ‘The haters will hate’: Dan Ives predicts Nasdaq 30,000 as AI rally expands
summary: Following strong corporate earnings reports, analyst Dan Ives forecasts the Nasdaq will reach 30,000 as the AI investment rally accelerates. Tech investor sentiment has shifted from early-year jitters to optimism.
content: A solid tech earnings season has seen investor jitters earlier this year evaporate

zh.title: "仇恨者自会仇恨"：Dan Ives预测随着AI热潮扩大，纳斯达克将达到30000点
zh.summary: 在企业强劲财报之后，分析师Dan Ives预测纳斯达克将在AI投资热潮加速的推动下达到30000点。科技投资者的情绪从年初的忧虑转变为乐观。

title: Cerebras bumps up IPO range as it looks to raise up to $4.8 billion
summary: AI chip manufacturer Cerebras is increasing its IPO valuation target to raise up to $4.8 billion as it moves toward a public listing. The company had previously been considered as a potential acquisition target by OpenAI.
content: Elon Musk was open to having OpenAI merge with Cerebras. Now Cerebras is looking at going public as soon as this week.

zh.title: 赛瑞思公司上调IPO目标估值 拟筹集最多48亿美元
zh.summary: AI芯片制造商赛瑞思公司上调IPO估值目标，计划筹集最多48亿美元，正在推进上市进程。该公司此前曾被认为是OpenAI的潜在收购目标。

title: Hantavirus cases spark surge in pharma and biotech stocks — here’s why
summary: A Hantavirus outbreak aboard a cruise ship has triggered a surge in biotech and pharmaceutical stocks on speculation about vaccine development efforts. The outbreak highlights demand for rapid medical countermeasures.
content: The outbreak of Hantavirus on a cruise ship has led to biotech and pharmaceutical stocks surging on reports of firms developing vaccines.

zh.title: 汉坦病毒病例引发制药和生物技术股票激增
zh.summary: 游轮上的汉坦病毒爆发引发生物技术和制药股票激增，市场对疫苗开发工作的前景进行了推测。这次疫情凸显了对快速医学对抗措施的需求。

title: Micron shares are rising again despite weak overall market. Why memory chip rally seems unstoppable
summary: Memory chip maker Micron's stock is rallying despite broader market weakness, driven by heavy retail investor enthusiasm on social media. The company benefits from continued AI infrastructure demand.
content: Micron is among the "most hyped stocks on social media" as retail enthusiasm simmers

zh.title: 尽管整体市场疲软，美光股价再次上升 为何存储芯片反弹势不可挡
zh.summary: 尽管市场整体走弱，存储芯片制造商美光的股价正在上升，受到社交媒体上散户投资者强烈热情的推动。该公司受益于对AI基础设施需求的持续增长。

title: A ‘race against time.’ Hormuz closure could push Brent to $150 a barrel by summer, warns Morgan Stanley.
summary: Morgan Stanley warns that a potential Strait of Hormuz closure could push Brent crude prices to $150 per barrel by summer. Current oil prices remain constrained, but geopolitical risks could rapidly change the outlook.
content: Oil is climbing to start the week as Morgan Stanley is warning that crude prices are being held at bay from much higher losses. But that could change.

zh.title: "与时间竞速"。霍尔木兹海峡关闭可能在夏季推高布伦特油价至每桶150美元，摩根士丹利警告
zh.summary: 摩根士丹利警告，霍尔木兹海峡可能关闭会在夏季前推高布伦特原油价格至每桶150美元。目前油价保持受限，但地缘政治风险可能迅速改变前景。

title: Here are Monday's biggest analyst calls: Nvidia, Micron, Tesla, FedEx, BP, Dell, Starz, Wendy's, Affirm & more
summary: Wall Street analysts issued major calls on Monday affecting stocks across technology, industrials, and consumer sectors. These recommendations shape investor portfolio positioning.
content: Here are Monday's biggest calls on Wall Street.

zh.title: 周一最重要的分析师评级：英伟达、美光、特斯拉、联邦快递、英国石油、戴尔、Starz、温迪斯、Affirm及更多
zh.summary: 华尔街分析师周一发布了影响科技、工业和消费部门股票的重大评级。这些建议影响投资者的投资组合配置。

title: This buy now, pay later stock can keep running after stellar month, Bank of America says
summary: Bank of America views Affirm's recent 5% stock pullback as a temporary correction rather than a reversal, maintaining confidence in the buy-now-pay-later platform's growth trajectory. The analyst expects the stock to continue its strong monthly performance.
content: Affirm's 5% pullback Friday post earnings is likely a "brief air pocket" that shouldn't prevent further gains, per Bank of America.

zh.title: 美银表示，这只"先买后付"股票在表现出色的一个月后可继续上涨
zh.summary: 美国银行将Affirm最近5%的股票回调视为暂时的技术调整而非反转，对这个先买后付平台的增长轨迹保持信心。分析师预期该股将继续其强劲的月度表现。

title: Congress and retailers want to rebuild national parks. Tolls on federal roads might pay for it
summary: Congress and major retailers are pursuing a bipartisan effort to fund national park improvements through federal road tolls, a priority that benefits outdoor recreation companies like REI and VF Corp. The initiative addresses infrastructure needs across the U.S. park system.
content: Rebuilding national parks is a bipartisan priority and key for outdoor recreation companies such as REI and VF Corp.

zh.title: 国会和零售商希望重建国家公园。联邦道路收费可能为其买单
zh.summary: 国会和主要零售商正在追求一项两党合作，通过联邦道路收费为国家公园改进提供资金，这对REI和VF公司等户外休闲公司来说是一个优先事项。该倡议解决了美国公园系统的基础设施需求。

title: IRS may owe millions of taxpayers refunds for pandemic-era penalty relief. How to file a claim
summary: Millions of U.S. taxpayers may qualify for refunds related to pandemic-era penalty relief following the Kwong v. United States court ruling. The IRS has established a deadline for taxpayers to file claims for their potential refunds.
content: Millions of Americans could be eligible for pandemic-era tax refunds based on Kwong v. United States ruling. Here's the deadline and who qualifies.

zh.title: 美国国税局可能欠数百万纳税人疫情时期罚款减免退款。如何申请
zh.summary: 根据《Kwong诉美国案》的法院裁决，数百万美国纳税人可能有资格获得与疫情时期罚款减免相关的退款。美国国税局已为纳税人制定了申请潜在退款的截止日期。

title: At TV upfronts, AI is in and corporate shuffles are reshaping the line-up
summary: Television industry upfront events are highlighting how artificial intelligence is being integrated into programming and advertising strategies. Media consolidation is simultaneously reshaping network lineups and content strategies.
content: Advertisers will be hearing about the slate of live events in the coming year — and how AI is being integrated. Plus, media consolidation reshapes the line-up.

zh.title: 在电视荧屏首映式上，人工智能占据主导地位，企业调整正在重塑阵容
zh.summary: 电视行业的首映式活动突出了人工智能如何被整合到节目和广告策略中。媒体整合同时正在重塑电视网络阵容和内容战略。

title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: Moderna, Lumentum, Intel, monday.com & more
summary: Several major technology and industrial stocks are experiencing significant premarket price movements. These early-session shifts often indicate market momentum heading into regular trading hours.
content: These are the stocks posting the largest moves premarket.

zh.title: 盘前走势最大的股票：Moderna、Lumentum、英特尔、monday.com等
zh.summary: 多家主要科技和工业股票在盘前交易中出现了显著的价格波动。这些早盘变动通常预示着进入常规交易时段的市场势头。

title: UK PM Starmer battles for political survival amid leadership challenge as gilt yields rise
summary: UK Prime Minister Keir Starmer faces internal party pressure over his leadership while calling for urgent action on economic growth, defense, and energy policy as government bond yields rise. The dual pressures may test his political position.
content: Starmer said that key issues of growth, defense, the U.K.'s relationship with Europe and energy must be urgently addressed.

zh.title: 英国首相斯塔默在领导力危机中为政治生存而战，英镑收益率上升
zh.summary: 英国首相基尔·斯塔默在面临党内领导力压力的同时，呼吁采取紧急行动应对经济增长、国防和能源政策问题，同时政府债券收益率上升。双重压力可能会考验他的政治地位。

title: AI plays in emerging markets offer more upside than in the U.S. at present, says JPMorgan
summary: JPMorgan argues that Asian technology stocks provide superior exposure to the artificial intelligence boom compared to U.S. alternatives, with better valuations and potential upside from broader dollar weakness. The emerging markets offer more compelling entry points for AI-related investments.
content: Asian tech stocks offer superior exposure to the U.S. AI boom — and at better valuations. Renewed dollar weakness could boost returns further.

zh.title: 摩根大通表示新兴市场的人工智能投资相比美国目前提供更多上升空间
zh.summary: 摩根大通辩称亚洲科技股相比美国替代品提供了更好的人工智能热潮敞口，估值更有吸引力，且存在更广泛美元走弱带来的上升潜力。新兴市场为人工智能相关投资提供了更有吸引力的切入点。

title: European markets open in mixed territory as Iran's peace talks stall
summary: European stocks opened in mixed territory Monday amid ongoing U.S.-Iran peace negotiations. Investors are closely monitoring the developments in diplomatic efforts that could impact market sentiment.
content: European stocks opened largely mixed on Monday as investors digest the latest in U.S.-Iran peace negotiations.

zh.title: 伊朗和平谈判陷入僵局，欧洲市场开盘表现不一
zh.summary: 在美国与伊朗正在进行的和平谈判中，欧洲股市周一开盘表现混合。投资者密切关注这些外交努力的发展，这可能会影响市场情绪。

title: Do you need a chief AI officer? Here's how the tech is changing boardrooms
summary: IBM's latest report shows most companies are now establishing chief AI officer roles as artificial intelligence reshapes corporate leadership. The trend reflects how companies are adapting their C-suite structures to manage AI strategy and implementation.
content: AI may now be coming for the C-suite, according to a report published Monday by IBM, which found that most companies were now staffing chief AI officer roles.

zh.title: 你需要首席人工智能官吗？科技如何改变了董事会
zh.summary: IBM最新报告显示，随着人工智能重塑企业领导层，大多数公司现在都在建立首席人工智能官职位。这一趋势反映了公司如何调整其C级管理结构来管理人工智能战略和实施。

title: Trump and Xi are set to meet. Where do US-China tariffs stand?
summary: U.S. President Trump is set to visit China for the first time in nearly a decade, testing the stability of current trade agreements. The meeting will be a critical moment for discussing the fragile tariff truce between the two economic powers.
content: The first US presidential visit to China in almost 10 years will test a fragile tariff truce.

zh.title: 特朗普和习近平即将会面。美中关税现状如何？
zh.summary: 美国总统特朗普将近十年来首次访华，这将考验当前贸易协议的稳定性。这次会议将是讨论两个经济大国之间脆弱关税停火的关键时刻。

title: Council confirms £300 heating oil support
summary: A local council has confirmed £300 in heating oil support for residents without access to the gas grid. The measure aims to ensure disadvantaged households can afford winter heating costs.
content: "Residents should not be left behind simply because they are off the gas grid," council leader says.

zh.title: 市议会确认提供300英镑供暖油补助
zh.summary: 当地市议会已确认为无法使用天然气的居民提供300英镑的供暖油补助。该措施旨在确保弱势家庭能够承担冬季供暖成本。

title: Singapore flags weaker tourism spending as global travel industry faces uncertainty
summary: Singapore expects tourism spending to decline from record 2025 levels despite continued growth in visitor arrivals. The slowdown reflects broader uncertainty affecting the global travel industry.
content: Singapore expects tourism spending to ease from last year’s record, even as visitor arrivals continue to rise.

zh.title: 新加坡指出全球旅游业面临不确定性下旅游支出疲软
zh.summary: 尽管游客到达数量继续增长，新加坡预计旅游支出将从2025年创纪录水平下降。这一放缓反映了影响全球旅游业的更广泛的不确定性。

title: Modi says Iran war poses severe risks to India, urges cuts in fuel use and gold purchases
summary: Indian Prime Minister Modi warned that the Iran-Middle East conflict poses significant risks to India's energy security. He called on Indians to reduce fuel consumption, overseas travel, and gold purchases to mitigate the impact of India's heavy dependence on imported energy.
content: Modi appealed to Indians to cut fuel use, overseas travel and gold purchases as the Middle East conflict exposes India’s heavy reliance on imported energy.

zh.title: 莫迪称伊朗战争对印度构成严重风险，呼吁减少燃料使用和黄金购买
zh.summary: 印度总理莫迪警告说，伊朗-中东冲突对印度的能源安全构成重大风险。他呼吁印度人减少燃料消耗、海外旅行和黄金购买，以缓解印度对进口能源的严重依赖所带来的影响。

title: Iran says it will 'never bow' as Trump rejects peace counteroffer, prolonging Middle East conflict
summary: Iran rejected peace proposals while the U.S. seeks Chinese leverage to pressure Tehran over Middle East tensions. The diplomatic stalemate threatens to prolong regional conflict.
content: Washington has sought to press Beijing to lean on Tehran to reopen the strait, though China's appetite to act as a pressure mechanism remains unclear.

zh.title: 伊朗称"永不屈服"，特朗普拒绝和平反提议，中东冲突持续
zh.summary: 伊朗拒绝和平提议，美国寻求中国杠杆施压德黑兰缓解中东紧张局势。外交僵局威胁延长地区冲突。

title: China inflation beat estimates in April as Iran war drives producer prices to three-year highs
summary: China's inflation exceeded analyst expectations in April, driven by energy price spikes from the Iran conflict. Producer prices reached three-year highs despite the country's strategic oil reserves and renewable energy diversification efforts.
content: China has cushioned the worst of the energy shock through its strategic oil stockpiles and a diversified mix of renewable energy sources.

zh.title: 伊朗战争推高生产者价格至三年新高，中国四月通胀超预期
zh.summary: 中国四月通胀超出分析师预期，由伊朗冲突驱动的能源价格飙升推动。尽管该国战略石油储备和可再生能源多元化努力，生产者价格仍达三年新高。

title: Dua Lipa sues Samsung for $15m over use of her image on TV boxes
summary: Pop star Dua Lipa is suing Samsung for $15 million, alleging the company used her image on television boxes without permission. The lawsuit raises questions about unauthorized commercial use of celebrity likenesses.
content: The pop star's legal team alleges a photograph of her face was used on Samsung television boxes without permission.

zh.title: 杜娅·利帕起诉三星就电视机盒上未授权使用其形象索赔1500万美元
zh.summary: 流行歌星杜娅·利帕以三星未经许可在电视机上使用其形象为由起诉三星，要求赔偿1500万美元。该诉讼提出了名人肖像未授权商业使用的问题。

title: Oil prices jump after Trump dismisses Iran proposal to end war
summary: Oil prices surged following President Trump's rejection of an Iranian peace proposal, intensifying Middle East tensions. The continued closure of the Strait of Hormuz has severely disrupted global energy shipments.
content: The Strait of Hormuz waterway remains effectively shut, severely disrupting global energy shipments.

zh.title: 特朗普驳回伊朗建议后油价上涨
zh.summary: 特朗普总统拒绝伊朗和平提议后，油价飙升，中东局势紧张加剧。霍尔木兹海峡的持续关闭严重破坏了全球能源运输。

title: Oil climbs as Netanyahu and Trump remarks stoke worries over rising Middle East tensions
summary: Oil prices rose sharply following statements from Netanyahu and Trump regarding ongoing Middle East tensions between Israel and Iran. The remarks intensified market concerns about potential escalation in the region. This uncertainty in geopolitics is driving commodity price volatility.
content: Oil prices jumped on Monday after Israel warned that the conflict with Iran was still ongoing.

zh.title: 油价上涨，内塔尼亚胡和特朗普言论加剧中东紧张局势担忧
zh.summary: 在内塔尼亚胡和特朗普就以色列与伊朗之间的中东紧张局势发表声明后，油价大幅上扬。这些言论加剧了市场对该地区可能升级的担忧。地缘政治不确定性正在推动大宗商品价格波动。

title: I’m giving $10,000 to my stepchildren. My wife warned me against gifts of equal value for my nephews. Is that fair?
summary: A reader seeks advice on the fairness of gifting $10,000 equally to stepchildren and nephews from a $4 million household. The query raises questions about family gift-giving equity across different relationships.
content: “Our net worth is about $4 million, and we are both 60.”

zh.title: 我给继子女每人1万美元，妻子警告我不要给侄子侄女同等金额的礼物。这公平吗？
zh.summary: 一位读者寻求关于从400万美元家庭中平均赠送1万美元给继子女和侄子侄女是否公平的建议。这个问题引发了关于不同关系之间家庭赠送公平性的讨论。

title: From Singapore to Brussels, world leaders eye Trump-Xi summit from afar
summary: World leaders across Asia and Europe are closely monitoring the upcoming Trump-Xi summit between the U.S. and China. The meeting is drawing significant international attention as nations assess implications for global trade and diplomatic relations. Key stakeholders are positioned to observe the outcome from various global capitals.
content: The world will be watching the Trump-Xi summit.

zh.title: 从新加坡到布鲁塞尔，世界各国领导人关注特朗普-习近平峰会
zh.summary: 亚洲和欧洲的世界领导人正密切关注即将召开的美中特朗普-习近平峰会。这次会议正吸引重大国际关注，各国评估其对全球贸易和外交关系的影响。主要利益相关者准备从各自的全球首都观察结果。

title: South Korea's Kospi hits fresh record as Asia markets trade mixed amid oil surge, Iran risks
summary: South Korea's Kospi index reached a fresh record high while other Asian markets showed mixed performance amid rising oil prices. The gain reflected investor optimism despite concerns about Middle East tensions, as Trump's rejection of Iran's ceasefire proposal heightened fears of prolonged conflict. Geopolitical uncertainty continues to create mixed signals in the region's equity markets.
content: Investors headed into Monday on edge as Trump’s rejection of Iran’s ceasefire proposal fueled concerns about a prolonged Middle East conflict.

zh.title: 韩国综合指数创新高，亚洲市场在油价飙升和伊朗风险中涨跌互现
zh.summary: 在油价上升的背景下，韩国综合指数创下历史新高，而其他亚洲市场表现不一。尽管对中东紧张局势存有担忧，这一涨幅反映了投资者的乐观情绪。随着特朗普拒绝伊朗的停火提议，对长期冲突的担忧加剧。地缘政治不确定性在该地区股票市场中继续造成混合信号。

title: U.S. stock futures fall, oil surges as Trump calls Iran’s latest offer to end war ‘totally unacceptable’
summary: U.S. stock index futures declined while oil prices surged after President Trump rejected Iran's latest ceasefire proposal, calling it "totally unacceptable." The sharp market reaction reflects investor concerns about the continuation of Middle East hostilities and their impact on energy markets. The diplomatic impasse suggests prolonged geopolitical uncertainty ahead.
content: U.S. stock-index futures fell and oil prices rose on Sunday, after President Donald Trump called Iran’s response to the latest U.S. proposal to end the war “totally unacceptable.”

zh.title: 美股期货下跌，特朗普称伊朗最新结束战争提议"完全不可接受"之际油价飙升
zh.summary: 在特朗普拒绝伊朗最新停火提议并称其"完全不可接受"后，美国股指期货下跌，油价飙升。市场的剧烈反应反映了投资者对中东敌对行动持续及其对能源市场影响的担忧。外交僵局预示着前方存在长期的地缘政治不确定性。
